title: Course: COSC 332 - Introduction to Game Design and Development
course_name: Introduction to Game Design and Development
description: Familiarizes students with game development tools and practices using industry-standard resources like Unity3D. Features hands-on projects applying various game development techniques to create basic games.
prerequisites_text: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 332 - Introduction to Game Design and Development
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: As needed

Description: Familiarizes students with game development tools and practices using industry-standard resources like Unity3D. Features hands-on projects applying various game development techniques to create basic games.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group B
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group B

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55582
